interaction_phrase: its registration statement on Form S-4 covering the Andretti and Zapata Computing,
occurrence_sentence: Andretti Acquisition Corp. announced the SEC approved its registration statement on Form S-4 covering the Andretti and Zapata Computing, Inc combination.

Andretti Acquisition Corp. announced today that its registration statement on Form S-4 (the "Registration Statement") relating to the previously announced proposed business combination between Andretti and Zapata Computing, Inc. ("Zapata AI"), the Industrial Generative AI software company developing solutions and applications to solve enterprises' hardest problems, has been declared effective by the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (the "SEC").

Andretti Acquisition Corp. announced today that its registration statement on Form S-4 (the "Registration Statement") relating to the previously announced proposed business combination between Andretti and Zapata Computing, Inc. ("Zapata AI"), the Industrial Generative AI software company developing solutions and applications to solve enterprises' hardest problems, has been declared effective by the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (the "SEC").
